title: Meadow Friends Coloring Page
alt: Sissy, Addy, Buddy, and Flitter together in a flower meadow with a flowered archway and clouds, drawn as bold outlines to color in.
blurb: Color Sissy and all her meadow friends in the flower field.

title: Make a Paper Butterfly
alt: A craft card with four steps to fold and cut a paper butterfly, plus a grown-up helper note and safety line.
blurb: Fold, cut, and decorate a butterfly friend from one sheet of paper.

title: Meadow Friends Word Search
alt: A ten-by-ten letter grid word search hiding the names of Sissy and her meadow friends.
blurb: Find Sissy, Addy, Buddy, and Flitter hiding in the grid.

title: Butterfly Connect-the-Dots
alt: A connect-the-dots puzzle: numbered dots that draw a butterfly outline to color.
blurb: Connect the dots in order to reveal a butterfly, then color it.

title: Count the Meadow Counting Sheet
alt: A counting worksheet with rows of butterflies, flowers, and stars to count and write.
blurb: Count the butterflies, flowers, and stars, then write the number.

title: Sissy's Meadow Hop Board Game
alt: A printable roll-and-move board game with a winding path from start to finish.
blurb: Roll a die and hop along the meadow path to the finish.

title: Rainbow Breaths Calm-Down Card
alt: A social-emotional calm-down card with five gentle rainbow breathing steps for big feelings.
blurb: A gentle breathing game for big feelings - breathe a calm rainbow.

title: The Flutter Song Lyric & Action Sheet
alt: A sing-and-move lyric sheet set to Twinkle, Twinkle, with an action for every line.
blurb: New butterfly words to Twinkle, Twinkle - with an action for every line.

title: Butterfly Teacher Pack (Book 1 Companion)
alt: A one-page teacher and read-aloud companion for the first Sissy the Butterfly book: an introduction, a discussion question, and a go-do activity.
blurb: A free read-aloud companion for Book 1: intro, a talk-about-it question, and a go-do.

title: Make Your Own Meadow Map
alt: A make-your-own template inviting a child to draw and name their own map of the meadow.
blurb: Draw and name your very own map of Sissy's meadow.

title: Courage Quote Poster
alt: A printable poster with a gentle courage quote from Sissy the Butterfly for a child's wall.
blurb: A gentle courage quote for the bedroom wall or classroom.

title: Nature Word Search
alt: A ten-by-ten letter grid word search hiding garden and nature words like flower, seed, and petal.
blurb: Hunt for garden and nature words hidden in the grid.

title: Kindness Word Search
alt: A ten-by-ten letter grid word search hiding kind words like brave, share, care, and friend.
blurb: Find the kindness words - brave, share, care, and more.

title: Match the Meadow
alt: A draw-a-line matching worksheet pairing meadow things with what they do, like butterfly to flutters.
blurb: Draw a line to match each meadow friend with what it does.

title: I Spy the Meadow
alt: A count-and-find I-Spy scene: butterflies, flowers, and stars scattered across the meadow to count.
blurb: Count how many butterflies, flowers, and stars you can spy.

title: Flower Connect-the-Dots
alt: A connect-the-dots puzzle: numbered dots that draw a flower outline to color.
blurb: Connect the dots in order to reveal a flower, then color it.

title: Butterfly Maze
alt: A printable maze with a winding path from START at the top to END at the bottom.
blurb: Find the path through the maze from START to END.

title: Butterfly Hug Calm-Down Card
alt: A social-emotional calm-down card teaching the butterfly hug - a gentle self-hug for big feelings.
blurb: A gentle self-hug game to help settle big feelings.

title: Five Little Senses Calm-Down Card
alt: A social-emotional grounding card: notice five things you see, four you touch, and more.
blurb: A noticing game that brings worried minds back to now.

title: Balloon Belly Calm-Down Card
alt: A social-emotional calm-down card teaching slow belly breathing - fill your tummy like a balloon.
blurb: A slow belly-breathing game for calming down.

title: Flutter and Freeze Movement Card
alt: An active-play movement card: flutter like a butterfly, then freeze - inclusive, no competition, feet-on-the-floor.
blurb: Flutter, then freeze - a wiggle game for indoors or out.

title: Backyard Butterfly Hunt Outdoor Card
alt: An outdoor adventure card: a gentle backyard scavenger hunt with a look-closely wonder prompt.
blurb: A backyard scavenger hunt for little explorers.

title: Paper Plate Butterfly Craft
alt: A craft card with steps to make a butterfly from a paper plate, plus a grown-up helper note and safety line.
blurb: Turn a paper plate into a bright butterfly friend.

title: The Kindness Song Lyric & Action Sheet
alt: A sing-and-move lyric sheet set to The More We Get Together, teaching kindness, with an action for every line.
blurb: New kindness words to a classic tune - with an action for every line.

title: Design Your Own Butterfly Wings
alt: A make-your-own template inviting a child to design and name their own butterfly wings.
blurb: Design and name your very own butterfly wings.

title: Friendship Read-Aloud Card
alt: A one-page read-aloud companion about friendship: an introduction, a discussion question, and a go-do activity.
blurb: A free read-aloud about friendship: intro, a talk-about-it question, and a go-do.
